application.doc: Get the status of all High-Volume Database cleanup tasks

param.name: appliance_hostname
param.doc: Host name of the appliance.

method.name: GET
method.id: Get the status of all High-Volume Database cleanup tasks
method.doc: Get the current status of all High-Volume Database (HVDB) cleanup tasks. Task status information includes task total run time, the date/time the task was last ran, the current state of the task, and the number of Database rows removed when the task last ran. Task state information is lost when the local management interface is restarted.

request.doc:
Get the current status of HVDB tasks.
GET https://{appliance_hostname}/mga/cleanup_tasks/v1

param.name: Authorization
param.doc: Basic Authentication header

param.name: Accept:application/json
param.doc: Required for requests to the service

param.name: Content-Type:application/json
param.doc: Response is in JSON formatting

param.name: mmfaTransactions
param.doc: The status of the MMFA Transactions HVDB cleanup task.

param.name: mmfaAuthenticators
param.doc: The status of the MMFA Authenticators HVDB cleanup task.

param.name: authsvcSessionCache
param.doc: The status of the Authentication Service Session Cache HVDB cleanup task.

param.name: deviceRegistrations
param.doc: The status of the RBA Device Registration HVDB cleanup task.

param.name: oauthToken
param.doc: The status of the Oauth Token Cache HVDB cleanup task.

param.name: dmapCache
param.doc: The status of the Distributed Map Cache HVDB cleanup task.

param.name: lastRan
param.doc: The Date/Time that the task was last ran. If the task has not run to completion since the last LMI restart this will be set to "NEVER".

param.name: runTime
param.doc: The time that the task ran for. If the task has not ran since the last LMI restart this will be set to "NOT_FOUND".

param.name: status
param.doc: The current status of this task. Valid status include "IDLE", "QUEUED", and "RUNNING".

param.name: recordsRemoved
param.doc: The number of records removed from the HVDB when this task last ran.

response.doc: There is a problem with the request. The JSON message describes the problem.

param.name: Content-Type:application/json
param.doc: Response is in JSON formatting

param.name: message
param.doc: The error message.

response.doc: File not Found, The requested service does not exist. The JSON message indicates which resource.

param.name: Content-Type:application/json
param.doc: Response is in JSON formatting

param.name: message
param.doc: The error message.

response.doc: An internal error occurred. The JSON message indicates the problem.

param.name: Content-Type:application/json
param.doc: Response is in JSON formatting

param.name: message
param.doc: The error message.
